name: Hot Buttered Cider
recipeIngredient: 7 cups Apple cider OR apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple cider or apple juice and brown sugar in a large saucepan.
2. Tie the cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and lemon peel together in a square of 100 percent cotton cheesecloth to create a spice bag.
3. Add the spice bag to the cider mixture.
4. Bring the mixture to boiling over high heat.
5. Reduce heat and let simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
6. Remove and discard the spice bag.
7. Stir in the rum.
8. Pour the cider mixture into mugs.
9. Float about 1/2 teaspoon of butter or margarine on each mug.
10. Top each serving with one or two thin apple slices.
11. Makes about 10 servings (6-ounce).
